project.name: ETF Rotation Research Lab
project.scope: A-share ETF rotation research, simulated execution, and non-production execution-policy validation.
project.status: research-to-paper system; not a production trading system

notes: This is a 5m proxy execution study, not a true 1m intraday execution backtest.
Future forward 1m validation is required before any production use.

engineering_timeline.label: BaoStock 5m proxy and frozen delayed-sell hypothesis
